rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks for component ports must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Implementation-level bindings should be placed in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections are defined
generic_rules: Component type contracts should reference visible ports and outputs, not implementation-only subcomponent paths
AGREE guarantees for output dependencies should relate visible outputs to visible inputs
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use valid AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool for const and eq declarations
Ensure AGREE annex blocks are syntactically valid with proper scoping
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing subcomponent ports in component type annexes; use visible variables or outputs instead
